src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger annotations and imports with SpringDoc OpenAPI equivalents.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace) and does not compile; SpringDoc is the required replacement.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Remove the @EnableSwagger2 annotation as it is no longer needed with SpringDoc.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: The annotation belongs to the removed Springfox library and causes a compile error.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Refactor the Docket bean definition to use the SpringDoc GroupedOpenApi builder pattern.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: The Docket class is from Springfox and no longer exists; the bean must be redefined using SpringDoc APIs to compile.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Migrate Swagger annotations from v2 (springfox) to v3 (springdoc-openapi) to support Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: The io.swagger.annotations package is removed in Springdoc OpenAPI v2+ and Spring Boot 3; using old annotations causes compilation errors or missing API documentation.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; javax.validation classes are no longer available on the classpath, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compilation failure.
ApiOperation is not recognized by Springdoc OpenAPI; code will not compile or will fail at runtime if the annotation processor expects v3 annotations.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Update @ApiResponse attributes from code/message to responseCode/description.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: The io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.responses.ApiResponse annotation does not have 'code' or 'message' attributes; using them causes compilation errors.
ApiParam is not recognized by Springdoc OpenAPI; code will not compile or will fail at runtime.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Update @ApiImplicitParams and @ApiImplicitParam to @Parameters and @Parameter with schema.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: ApiImplicitParams and ApiImplicitParam are not recognized by Springdoc OpenAPI; code will not compile or will fail at runtime.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.before: @ApiImplicitParams({ @ApiImplicitParam(name = "page", dataType = "integer", paramType = "query", value = "Results page you want to retrieve (0..N)", defaultValue = "0") })
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.after: @Parameters({ @Parameter(name = "page", description = "Results page you want to retrieve (0..N)", schema = @Schema(defaultValue = "0")) })

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Migrate Swagger annotations from v2 (io.swagger.annotations) to v3 (io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations) to align with Spring Boot 3 and OpenAPI 3 standards.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.why_exists: The io.swagger.annotations package is removed in SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.x (required for Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors if not replaced.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Migrate Java EE validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+, where javax.validation classes are removed; using javax causes NoClassDefFoundError or compilation failure.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Migrate Swagger 2 annotations to Swagger 3 (OpenAPI 3) annotations.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.why_exists: The package io.swagger.annotations is removed in SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.x (required for Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation annotations to jakarta.validation annotations.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.why_exists: The package javax.validation is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (required for Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Migrate Hibernate Types imports from com.vladmihalcea to io.hypersistence.utils.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: The com.vladmihalcea package is deprecated/removed in newer versions of hibernate-types, causing compile errors.
